subject: Network Error banner on all consoles — site-wide WebSocket disconnect
description: All 16 console stations at Lakewood PSAP are showing 'Network Error' banners and WebSocket disconnect messages. The issue started at approximately 14:10 local time. Our IT team confirmed a switch firmware update was applied to the core switch at 14:05. Reverting the switch firmware at 14:35 restored console connectivity. All stations are now operational.

comments.author: itops@lakewood911.gov
comments.body: Confirmed: switch firmware rollback at 14:35 resolved all console Network Error banners. All 16 stations reconnected within 60 seconds of rollback. Root cause was vendor switch firmware v3.8.1 breaking VLAN trunking on port-channel 4 which carries APEX console traffic.

comments.author: noc@carbyne.com
comments.body: [internal] Confirmed network-layer cause. APEX server logs show clean WebSocket disconnects correlated exactly with switch firmware event at 14:05. No APEX software issue. Customer IT handled the fix. Vendor fork (B) — link to site master ticket.
